title: [Origin Realms] SPIRIT SKINS
description: Adds new textures and fixes for Spirit Tools with Skins for the Origin Realms Server - Will be constantly Updated
body:
This Resource pack is meant to be used in [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com) Server
You probably wont understand what i mean if you dont play there, sorry but this pack is not meant for you then

# Origin Realms SPIRIT SKINS Resource Pack
 When Applying event or item skins in Spirit Tools (Bow/Axe/Sword) they lost the textures unless they dont have any  grim-charge
This packs not only fix this but also gives whole new set of textures for each item skin in every single state of grim-charge 
## More Info below

# [To Support Me and my pack, you can donate or even buy comissions, im making OriginRealms-NPClike Avatars](https://twitter.com/MarkiS_arts/status/1723714609134096607)
![Some of Avatars Made by me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NIMd1nI6/images/278baaf0dc70ac9f328e163b1c6631c5c32d0972.png)


This Pack does Need [ServerPackUnlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) just like every OriginRealms Resourcepacks
but it also needs either [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

If you find any bugs you can call me on Discord (@its_markis) or Twitter ([@Markis_arts](twitter.com/Markis_arts))
Yes i had permission to do it you can check [here](https://discord.com/channels/634540727606575115/1170046903937941575) if you are in origin realms discord server
